message:
feat(dashboard): RFC3339Nano timestamp parsing, sidebar attention panel, ultra/mega focus fix

Three dashboard improvements:

1. RFC3339Nano timestamp parsing (commands.go, commands_test.go):
   - fetchAttentionCmd() now tries time.RFC3339Nano before falling back
     to RFC3339, preserving sub-second precision from attention events
   - TestFetchAttentionCmdParsesRFC3339NanoAndSorts verifies parsing of
     both formats, background event filtering, action_required-first
     sorting, and agent_type extraction from details map

2. Sidebar attention panel embedding (dashboard.go):
   - renderSidebar() now includes the attention panel when height permits
     (min height from panel config, capped at 12 lines, max 1/3 of
     available height)
   - Ultra and mega layout sidebar borders now highlight when either
     PanelSidebar or PanelAttention is focused

3. Struct field alignment (dashboard.go):
   - Realign attentionFeedOK, lastAttentionFetch, fetchingAttention
     fields to consistent column formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
